properties.description:
Data Flow to pull data from ADLS Stg to ADLS Raw.
No schema defined in source or Target, Schema drift was used along with column rules to direct data into Sink.

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'Filename',
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath + $FileName + '.csv')]) ~> srcP6EngrHistogramStage
srcP6EngrHistogramStage derive(Filename = concat($WildPath,substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$FileName,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		Contract as string,
		Phase as string,
		Office as string,
		TYPE as string,
		Prime as string,
		{Sub Prime} as string,
		SFN as string,
		{Activity Code} as string,
		Discipline as string,
		PSRL1Code as string,
		PSRL2Code as string,
		Period as string,
		Units as string
	),
	rowUrlColumn:'Filename',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: []) ~> snkP6EngrHistogramRaw
